parameters.title: Model Parameters
parameters.description: Adjust parameters to control model behavior

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls response creativity. Low values = more focused, high values = more creative

maxTokensParam.label: Max Tokens
maxTokensParam.description: Maximum number of tokens in response. More tokens = longer responses

topP.label: Top P
topP.description: Controls diversity of chosen words. Low values = more focused

frequencyPenalty.label: Frequency Penalty
frequencyPenalty.description: Reduces word repetition. Positive values = less repetition

presencePenalty.label: Presence Penalty
presencePenalty.description: Encourages model to talk about new topics. Positive values = more diversity

personality.title: AI Personality
personality.description: Choose how the AI should communicate with you

professional.label: Professional
professional.example: Based on data analysis, I recommend...

enthusiastic.label: Enthusiastic

detailed.label: Detailed
detailed.example: I'll explain each aspect in detail...

concise.label: Concise
concise.description: Brief, to the point and efficient

responseLength.title: Response Length
responseLength.description: How detailed should the responses be?

features.description: What additional information would you like to receive?

title: AI Preferences

model.title: AI Model
model.description: Choose the artificial intelligence model that best suits your needs

costWarning.title: Cost warning
costWarning.message: Estimated monthly cost is {cost}. Consider a cheaper model or reducing parameters.

parameters.title: Model Parameters
parameters.description: Adjust parameters to control model behavior

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls response creativity. Low values = more focused, high values = more creative.

maxTokens.label: Max Tokens
maxTokens.description: Response length: more tokens = longer and more detailed responses. Fewer tokens = more concise responses.

topP.label: Top P
topP.description: Controls diversity of chosen words. Low values = more predictable. High values = more diverse.

frequencyPenalty.label: Frequency Penalty
frequencyPenalty.description: Controls repetition: positive values reduce repeated words. Negative values increase terminological consistency.

presencePenalty.label: Presence Penalty
presencePenalty.description: Topic diversity: positive values encourage new topics. Negative values keep focus on existing topics.
